'''鈭歯g-d-ng''' ('''kangadang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quench|quench]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-d-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quench|quench]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-d-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kangadang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingadang|thingadang]] || [[word:jingadang|jingadang]] || [[word:shingadang|shingadang]] || [[word:kingadang|kingadang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungadang|thuthungadang]] || [[word:jujungadang|jujungadang]] || [[word:shushungadang|shushungadang]] || [[word:kukungadang|kukungadang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungadang|thungadang]] || [[word:jungadang|jungadang]] || [[word:shungadang|shungadang]] || [[word:kungadang|kungadang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungadang|thungadang]] || [[word:jungadang|jungadang]] || [[word:shungadang|shungadang]] || [[word:kungadang|kungadang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengadang|thengadang]] || [[word:jengadang|jengadang]] || [[word:shengadang|shengadang]] || [[word:kengadang|kengadang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongadang|thothongadang]] || [[word:jojongadang|jojongadang]] || [[word:shoshongadang|shoshongadang]] || [[word:kokongadang|kokongadang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongadang|thongadang]] || [[word:jongadang|jongadang]] || [[word:shongadang|shongadang]] || [[word:kongadang|kongadang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongadang|thongadang]] || [[word:jongadang|jongadang]] || [[word:shongadang|shongadang]] || [[word:kongadang|kongadang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngadang|th忙ngadang]] || [[word:j忙ngadang|j忙ngadang]] || [[word:sh忙ngadang|sh忙ngadang]] || [[word:k忙ngadang|k忙ngadang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangadang|thathangadang]] || [[word:jajangadang|jajangadang]] || [[word:shashangadang|shashangadang]] || [[word:kakangadang|kakangadang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangadang|thangadang]] || [[word:jangadang|jangadang]] || [[word:shangadang|shangadang]] || [[word:kangadang|kangadang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangadang|thangadang]] || [[word:jangadang|jangadang]] || [[word:shangadang|shangadang]] || [[word:kangadang|kangadang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangadang|shangadang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangadang|goshangadang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangadang|gokishangadang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangadangn眉|shangadangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangadangnkn眉|goshangadangnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangadangn眉|gokishangadangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangadangsh毛|shangadangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangadangnksh毛|goshangadangnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangadangsh毛|gokishangadangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangadangro|shangadangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangadangnkro|goshangadangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangadangro|gokishangadangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangadangmu|shangadangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangadangnkmu|goshangadangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangadangmu|gokishangadangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangadangsher|shangadangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangadangnksher|goshangadangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangadangsher|gokishangadangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangadang|shangadang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangadangnkng|goshangadangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangadang|gokishangadang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangadangya|shangadangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangadangnkya|goshangadangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangadangya|gokishangadangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangadangyam|shangadangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangadangnkyam|goshangadangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangadangyam|gokishangadangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangadangn眉sh毛|shangadangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangadangnkn眉sh毛|goshangadangnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangadangn眉sh毛|gokishangadangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangadangn眉ro|shangadangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangadangnkn眉ro|goshangadangnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangadangn眉ro|gokishangadangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangadangn眉mu|shangadangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangadangnkn眉mu|goshangadangnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangadangn眉mu|gokishangadangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangadangsh毛n眉|shangadangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangadangnksh毛n眉|goshangadangnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangadangsh毛n眉|gokishangadangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangadangsh毛ro|shangadangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangadangnksh毛ro|goshangadangnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangadangsh毛ro|gokishangadangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangadangsh毛mu|shangadangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangadangnksh毛mu|goshangadangnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangadangsh毛mu|gokishangadangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangadangron眉|shangadangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangadangnkron眉|goshangadangnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangadangron眉|gokishangadangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangadangrosh毛|shangadangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangadangnkrosh毛|goshangadangnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangadangrosh毛|gokishangadangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangadangromu|shangadangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangadangnkromu|goshangadangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangadangromu|gokishangadangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangadangmun眉|shangadangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangadangnkmun眉|goshangadangnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangadangmun眉|gokishangadangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangadangmush毛|shangadangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangadangnkmush毛|goshangadangnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangadangmush毛|gokishangadangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangadangmuro|shangadangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangadangnkmuro|goshangadangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangadangmuro|gokishangadangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
